name: Solana Clawd Model Kit Perps Tools

safety.private_key_policy: never write or read private keys through model-kit manifests
safety.side_effect_gate: --allow-live-env --yes is required if LIVE_TRADING=true is present

tools.description: Get the current SOL price in USD from CoinGecko.
tools.name: get_sol_price

tools.description: Get the current price of any Solana token by symbol or mint address. Known symbols: SOL, USDC, BONK, JUP, WIF, JTO, DRIFT, PYTH, mSOL, CLAWD.
tools.name: get_token_price

symbol.description: Token symbol (e.g. BONK) or mint address

tools.description: Get Phoenix DEX perpetual markets list with mark prices, 24h volume, open interest, and funding rates.
tools.name: get_perp_markets

market.description: Optional market filter, e.g. 'SOL-PERP'. Leave empty for all markets.

tools.description: Get the current funding rate for a Phoenix perpetual market. Positive = longs pay shorts; negative = shorts pay longs. Rate is per hour.
tools.name: get_funding_rate

tools.description: Get the Phoenix DEX orderbook for a perpetual market (top N bids and asks).
tools.name: get_orderbook

depth.description: Number of price levels to return (default: 5, max: 20)

tools.description: Get open perpetual positions for a wallet address on Phoenix DEX.
tools.name: check_positions

tools.description: Get SOL balance for a wallet address.
tools.name: check_sol_balance

tools.description: Get a Jupiter DEX swap quote. Shows best route, price impact, and expected output for swapping between any two Solana tokens.
tools.name: get_jupiter_quote

amount.description: Amount of input token to swap

input_mint.description: Input token symbol (SOL, USDC, etc.) or mint address

output_mint.description: Output token symbol or mint address

tools.description: Paper trade a Phoenix perpetual position. Simulates entry without real funds. Returns entry price, estimated liquidation, and risk metrics. Set paper=false only when LIVE_TRADING env var is 'true'.
tools.name: paper_trade

tools.description: Get a comprehensive market overview: SOL price, top gaining tokens, Phoenix perps summary, and network stats. Use for a quick snapshot before making trading decisions.
tools.name: get_market_overview

tools.description: Get recent trade history for a wallet on Phoenix DEX — entries, exits, realized PnL, and volume.
tools.name: get_trader_history

limit.description: Number of trades to fetch (default: 10, max: 50)

tools.description: Send SOL from the agent wallet to another address. In paper mode (default), simulates the transfer without signing. Set LIVE_TRADING=true to enable real transactions — requires AGENT_WALLET_KEYPAIR.
tools.name: send_sol

tools.description: Assess the risk of entering a perpetual position: liquidation price, max loss, funding cost projections, and a 1–10 risk score.
tools.name: assess_position_risk

capital_usd.description: Total trading capital for risk-% calculation
